prompt: Create a realistic vertical fashion-lifestyle photograph of a young East Asian woman in a bright minimalist perfume boutique, standing beside a glossy white display counter and smelling a small clear rectangular perfume bottle held near her nose. She has long black softly layered hair with curtain bangs, natural makeup, fair skin, and a calm introspective expression while looking slightly down and to the left in three-quarter profile. She wears a fitted ribbed short-sleeve square-neck crop top in pale lavender and a high-waisted white A-line mini skirt. The boutique background is sleek and luminous, with glass shelves, cool white LED strip lighting, and many neatly arranged perfume bottles and reed diffusers in soft focus; include one black bottle on a clear acrylic riser on the counter in the foreground. Use clean whites, silver accents, pale pastel tones, shallow depth of field, soft diffused commercial lighting, realistic skin texture, elegant editorial composition, vertical 9:16 framing, subject centered slightly left, upper body and skirt visible, no text, no logos, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a realistic vertical fashion-lifestyle photograph of a young East Asian woman in a bright minimalist perfume boutique, standing beside a glossy white display counter and smelling a small clear rectangular perfume bottle held near her nose. She has long black softly layered hair with curtain bangs, natural makeup, fair skin, and a calm introspective expression while looking slightly down and to the left in three-quarter profile. She wears a fitted ribbed short-sleeve square-neck crop top in pale lavender and a high-waisted white A-line mini skirt. The boutique background is sleek and luminous, with glass shelves, cool white LED strip lighting, and many neatly arranged perfume bottles and reed diffusers in soft focus; include one black bottle on a clear acrylic riser on the counter in the foreground. Use clean whites, silver accents, pale pastel tones, shallow depth of field, soft diffused commercial lighting, realistic skin texture, elegant editorial composition, vertical 9:16 framing, subject centered slightly left, upper body and skirt visible, no text, no logos, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的竖版时尚生活摄影作品，画面中一位年轻的东亚女性身处明亮简约的香水精品店，站在光洁的白色展示柜旁，正将一瓶小巧透明的长方形香水瓶凑近鼻尖嗅闻。她留着 黑色 的柔和层次感长发，配有八字刘海，妆容自然，皮肤白皙，神情平静而内敛，以四分之三侧脸看向左下方。她身穿一件 淡紫色 的修身罗纹短袖方领露脐上衣，搭配一条 白色 高腰 A 字迷你裙。精品店背景时尚且明亮，设有玻璃货架、冷白色 LED 灯带，以及许多虚化处理的整齐陈列的香水瓶和藤条香薰；前景的透明亚克力底座上放置着一个黑色香水瓶。采用纯净的白色、银色点缀和淡雅的柔和色调，运用浅景深、柔和的商业漫射光，呈现真实的皮肤质感，构图优雅且具有杂志大片感，采用 9:16 竖构图，主体略微偏左居中，展示上半身及裙装，无文字、无 Logo、无水印。
